/home/runner/work/eckit/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -fPIC  -pipe -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-sign-compare -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/eckit_distributed.dir/link.d  -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -shared -Wl,-soname,libeckit_distributed.so -o ../../../lib/libeckit_distributed.so CMakeFiles/eckit_distributed.dir/Actor.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_distributed.dir/Consumer.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_distributed.dir/Message.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_distributed.dir/NoTransport.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_distributed.dir/Producer.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_distributed.dir/Transport.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_distributed.dir/TransportHandle.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_distributed.dir/TransportStatistics.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_distributed.dir/tcp/TCPTransport.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../lib" ../../../lib/libeckit.so -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -ldl
